NpcsInRoom.Name: Elara the Druid
NpcsInRoom.TextToTell: The bunnies are overrunning the forest. Could you thin their numbers?

QuestsToGive.Name: Bunny Culling
QuestsToGive.Description: Kill 3 Lost Bunnies in the Glade Ring.

DropedItems.Name: Health Potion
DropedItems.Description: A small vial that restores 20 health points.

NpcsInRoom.Name: Bodrin the Merchant
NpcsInRoom.TextToTell: Those thieving foxes stole my wares! Bring me their pelts.

QuestsToGive.Name: Fox Hunt
QuestsToGive.Description: Kill 2 Thieving Foxes in this glade.

DropedItems.Name: Health Potion
DropedItems.Description: A small vial that restores 20 health points.

NpcsInRoom.Name: Sir Gareth
NpcsInRoom.TextToTell: The goblins have become a real threat. Prove your valor!

QuestsToGive.Name: Goblin Slayer
QuestsToGive.Description: Kill 2 Forest Goblins in the Thicket.

DropedItems.Name: Wooden Shield
DropedItems.Description: A crude wooden shield that increases your shield by 5.

NpcsInRoom.Name: Mira the Alchemist
NpcsInRoom.TextToTell: I need giant toad toxin for my experiments. Fetch some!

DropedItems.Name: Health Potion
DropedItems.Description: A small vial that restores 20 health points.

DropedItems.Name: Rusty Sword
DropedItems.Description: An old blade that adds 3 strength. Better than nothing.

DroppingItems.Name: Thorny Whip

NpcsInRoom.Name: Dwalin the Miner
NpcsInRoom.TextToTell: Bats are eating my lunch! Clear them out!

QuestsToGive.Name: Bat Extermination

DroppingItems.Name: Imp Horn

NpcsInRoom.TextToTell: The Cloud Serpents threaten our airships. Take them down!

QuestsToGive.Name: Serpent Scale
